role: time-slice supports do not determine the path fiber: two edge relations share identical state_sets (slices) but produce different Lift(y) and different recoverability verdicts

count_objects.pt_object: full pointwise relaxation Pt(y)=product_k F_k(y_k), identical across both variants
count_objects.lift_object: transition-compatible subset Lift(y) of Pt(y), computed once per edge-relation variant
count_objects.feature_object: image of Pt(y) and Lift(y) under the terminal-state feature map
